easy.title: Check Alembic Table Name
easy.description: Return default Alembic version table string.

medium.title: Write Manual Upgrade Code
medium.solution:
from alembic import op
import sqlalchemy as sa
def upgrade():
    op.add_column('users', sa.Column('email', sa.String(100)))
    return True

hard.title: Migration History Validator
hard.description: Verify list of revision IDs has unique parent-child hash links.

debugging.title: Fix Missing Downgrade
debugging.description: Add missing drop column in downgrade().
